title: Judge's order being set aside or modified by higher court not a reflection of his ability, integrity: Delhi HC
description: The Delhi High Court recently observed that a higher court's decision to set aside or modify a lower court's order is not a reflection of the ability or integrity of the judge who passed such an order [Sanjay Kumar Sain vs State of NCT of Delhi].Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma made the observation while dealing with an additional sessions judge's plea.He had filed an application to delete certain allegedly adverse remarks made against him by the High Court while deleting his criticism of the Delhi
